input.background: Calculate the mean and standard deviation of each group depicted in each of the side-by-side stemplots in this problem. Discuss how these statistics relate to what you see.
input.question: (b) Comparison B: Group 1 | Group 2

output.answer: Group 1: x̄=70 and s=15.8. Group 2: x̄=50 and s=15.8. How statistics relate to what we see: Higher central location in Group 1; equal group spreads.

Group 1.value: Values from the stemplot for Group 1
Group 1.description: Numerical data values for Group 1 from the stemplot.

Group 2.value: Values from the stemplot for Group 2
Group 2.description: Numerical data values for Group 2 from the stemplot.

mean_Group1.description: Mean of the numerical data values for Group 1.

stddev_Group1.description: Standard deviation of the numerical data values for Group 1.

mean_Group2.description: Mean of the numerical data values for Group 2.

stddev_Group2.description: Standard deviation of the numerical data values for Group 2.
